o.s.w.s.m.m.a.HttpEntityMethodProcessor : Using 'text/plain', given [*/*] and supported [text/plain, */*, application/json, application/*+json] 2026-05-12T17:07:33.498+07:00 DEBUG 13128 --- [user-management-test] [ main] o.s.w.s.m.m.a.HttpEntityMethodProcessor : Writing ["Password can't include spaces"] 2026-05-12T17:07:33.498+07:00 DEBUG 13128 --- [user-management-test] [ main] .m.m.a.ExceptionHandlerExceptionResolver : Resolved [org.springframework.web.bind.MethodArgumentNotValidException: Validation failed for argument [0] in public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<com.example.management.auth.AuthResponse> com.example.management.auth.AuthController.register(com.example.management.auth.RegisterRequest): [Field error in object 'registerRequest' on field 'password': rejected value [Test test]; codes [Pattern.registerRequest.password,Pattern.password,Pattern.java.lang.String,Pattern]; arguments [org.springframework.context.support.DefaultMessageSourceResolvable: codes [registerRequest.password,password]; arguments []; default message [password],[Ljakarta.validation.constraints.Pattern$Flag;@6c167296,^\s*\S+\s*$]; default message [Password can't include spaces]] ]
